title: tectaria cuneifolia
intro: Tectaria cuneifolia, also known as the wedge fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tectaria cuneifolia include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal preparations.
